channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Home Affairs Confirms Permanent Recognition for Muslim Marriage Officers
item.description: The Department of Home Affairs in South Africa has taken another step to promote equality for the Muslim faith community by ensuring that Muslim marriage officers are recognised on the same terms as o...

item.title: China Grants Zero Tariffs to 53 African Countries Starting May 2026: Opportunities and Potential Drawbacks
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping announce for February 2026 say from 1 May, China go remove all customs duties for imports from 53 African countries wey get diplomatic ties with Beijing. Only Eswatini no ...

item.title: Bristol nursery worker jailed for child sexual abuse amid safeguarding concerns
item.description: A 30-year-old early years practitioner, Nathan Bennett, was sentenced to 28 years in prison for the rape and sexual abuse of children in his care at Partou King Street Nursery in Bristol. The crimes w...

item.title: Charlotte Nichols MP speaks about her experience as a complainant in a rape trial
item.description: Charlotte Nichols, the Member of Parliament for Warrington North, recently spoke publicly about her experience as a complainant in a rape trial in which the defendant was acquitted of all charges. Wai...

item.title: myAIDA: AI-Powered Platform Launched to Boost Investment Knowledge Among Tanzanians
item.description: A new digital platform called myAIDA (my AI-Driven Analyst) has been developed by AIDA Technologies Limited in Tanzania to help ordinary citizens understand investment and financial matters more easil...

item.title: Choco Mucho clinches win over Zus Coffee to conclude PVL preliminaries
item.description: The Choco Mucho Flying Titans secured a decisive victory over the Zus Coffee Thunderbelles, ending the Premier Volleyball League (PVL) All-Filipino Conference preliminaries on a positive note. The mat...

item.title: Africa Governments and TikTok Partner to Protect Children Online
item.description: Governments across Africa don join hand with TikTok to make online space better and safer for children. This move dey follow after African Union adopt the Child Online Safety and Empowerment Policy fo...

item.title: PIA Denies Reports of Its Flight Narrowly Escaping Missile Incident Near Fujairah Airport
item.description: Pakistan International Airlines (PIA) has strongly rejected circulating reports that one of its flights narrowly escaped a missile attack while landing at Fujairah Airport in the United Arab Emirates ...

item.title: Nairobi County to Partner with Sidian Bank for Revenue Collection, Hospital Funds and Payroll Support
item.description: Nairobi City County Government is set to deepen its ties with Sidian Bank Limited through a new partnership that will see the bank handle key financial operations. According to documents presented to ...

item.title: Airbus considers legal action over Pratt & Whitney engine delivery delays
item.description: Airbus is increasing pressure on U.S. engine manufacturer Pratt & Whitney amid ongoing delays in engine deliveries, potentially seeking damages, according to sources familiar with the matter. The disp...

item.title: Christian Residents in Jos Share Iftar Meals with Muslims to Promote Religious Tolerance
item.description: Some Christian people for Jos North and Jos South Local Government Areas don dey show love and unity during this Ramadan period. Dem dey prepare plenty food and share am with their Muslim brothers and...

item.title: Couple debates public hand-holding in long-term relationship
item.description: Chantelle and Hugo have been together for five years, but a simple gesture has become a point of tension: holding hands in public. Chantelle, from an affectionate family, feels reassured by physical t...

item.title: Senegal Stand Ground, Reject CAF Decision to Strip AFCON Title Amid Growing Dispute
item.description: Serious wahala don burst for African football as Senegal refuse to return the Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) trophy after Confederation of African Football (CAF) strip them of the 2025 title. The issue...

item.title: Mrs South Africa semi-finalists highlighted as dedicated pet owners supported by dotsure.co.za
item.description: The article explores how several semi-finalists in the 2026 Mrs South Africa competition draw strength and emotional support from their pets amidst the demanding journey of personal growth, leadership...

item.title: Iran conflict exposes UK energy vulnerability, urges shift to renewables and reduced gas reliance
item.description: Amid the escalating war in Iran, which has seen strikes on key energy facilities in Iran, Qatar's Ras Laffan complex, and refineries in Saudi Arabia and Kuwait, global oil and gas prices have surged d...

item.title: Victor Osimhen suffers right forearm fracture in Galatasaray's 4-0 UCL loss to Liverpool
item.description: Victor Osimhen, the Nigerian striker wey dey play for Galatasaray, don suffer fractured right forearm during their UEFA Champions League Round of 16 second leg match against Liverpool for Anfield. The...

item.title: Pedestrian sustains serious injuries in vehicle collision in Woolwich Township
item.description: A serious collision in Woolwich Township, part of Ontario's Waterloo Region, has left a pedestrian with significant injuries. Emergency services, including Waterloo Regional Police, responded to the i...

item.title: Gladness Mosha’s journey from logistics operations to strategic leadership at Simba Clearing
item.description: Hii habari inaelezea safari ya kitaaluma ya Gladness Mosha, ambaye ni Chief Operating Officer wa Simba Clearing & Freight Forwarding Ltd, na namna alivyojijenga kutoka ngazi ya chini ya uendeshaji had...

item.title: Marcos orders fare hike suspension; transport drivers to receive more government aid
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. announced that the government will increase financial aid for public utility vehicle (PUV) drivers after suspending the planned one-peso fare hike. The suspen...
